name: Moz Links API
description: The Moz Links API provides programmatic access to Moz's link intelligence data, including domain authority, page authority, spam score, link metrics, anchor text analysis, and more. This API enables SEO professionals and developers to retrieve detailed link and authority data for any URL, subdomain, or root domain on the web.
